history.qwen_observation: Recipe validation failed because parameterized recipes were passed as colon-delimited strings instead of structured mappings with 'name' and explicit parameter keys.
history.qwen_rationale: OpenRewrite requires recipes that accept parameters to be expressed as objects containing a 'name' field alongside the parameter fields (e.g., groupId, artifactId, newVersion, key, newValue). Correcting the syntax for the lombok bump step and ensuring all other steps use valid bare FQNs or properly structured mappings will resolve the validation error and allow the migration chain to execute.
